name: producer
description: PM workspace: Claude Code/Codex + file viewer

scripts.build: scripts/check-signing.sh prebuild && electron-builder --mac --dir && scripts/check-signing.sh postbuild && rm -rf /Applications/Producer.app && ditto dist/mac-arm64/Producer.app /Applications/Producer.app

extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Producer needs access to your files to display them in the file viewer.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Producer needs access to your files to display them in the file viewer.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Producer needs access to Downloads to display your files in the file viewer.
extendInfo.NSFileProviderDomainUsageDescription: Producer needs access to cloud storage folders such as Dropbox to display your files in the file viewer.
extendInfo.NSNetworkVolumesUsageDescription: Producer needs access to network volumes to display your files in the file viewer.
extendInfo.NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription: Producer needs access to removable volumes to display your files in the file viewer.

author: Eytan Davidovits
